name: Autoflow — Negócio + APM
description: Métricas de negócio (AutoflowBizEvent) e APM dos 6 microsserviços do autoflow. Atualizado para refletir os eventos custom emitidos via recordBusinessEvent.

pages.name: Negócio
pages.description: Funnel de OS → orçamento → cobrança → pagamento + métricas de saga e estoque.

widgets.title: Funnel: OS criada → aprovada → cobrada → paga → cancelada

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName IN ('OrderCreated','BudgetApproved','ChargeCreated','PaymentApproved','OrderCancelled') FACET CASES (WHERE eventName='OrderCreated' AS '1. OS criada', WHERE eventName='BudgetApproved' AS '2. Orçamento aprovado', WHERE eventName='ChargeCreated' AS '3. Cobrança gerada', WHERE eventName='PaymentApproved' AS '4. Pagamento aprovado', WHERE eventName='OrderCancelled' AS 'X. Cancelada') SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT sum(totalCents)/100 AS 'R$ aprovado' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='PaymentApproved' SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName IN ('PaymentApproved','PaymentRejected') FACET eventName SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: OSs ativas — status atual por orderId

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(toStatus) AS 'Status atual', count(*) AS 'Transições (24h)' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='OrderStatusChanged' FACET orderId SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT 100

widgets.title: OSs por destino de status (24h, único por orderId)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='IN_DIAGNOSIS') AS 'Em diagnóstico', filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='WAITING_APPROVAL') AS 'Aguardando aprovação', filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='IN_EXECUTION') AS 'Em execução', filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='READY') AS 'Prontas', filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='DELIVERED') AS 'Entregues', filter(uniqueCount(orderId), WHERE toStatus='CANCELLED') AS 'Canceladas' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='OrderStatusChanged' SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT average(durationMs)/1000 AS 'Duração média (s)', percentile(durationMs, 95)/1000 AS 'p95 (s)' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='ExecutionCompleted' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Qtd', latest(changedBy) AS 'Por' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='OrderCancelled' FACET reason SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName IN ('SagaReserved','SagaConsumed','SagaReservationFailed','SagaCompensation') FACET eventName TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Saga: tempo médio (reserva e completa, em s)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(average(elapsedMs)/1000, WHERE eventName='SagaReserved') AS 'Reserva (s)', filter(average(totalElapsedMs)/1000, WHERE eventName='SagaConsumed') AS 'Saga completa (s)' FROM AutoflowBizEvent TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Qtd' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='SagaCompensation' FACET step, reason SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT 50
SELECT sum(quantity) FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName IN ('StockReserved','StockConsumed') FACET eventName TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Faltas', sum(requested) AS 'Pedidos', sum(available) AS 'Disponível na hora' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='StockInsufficient' FACET partId SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT 25

SELECT count(*) AS 'Alertas', latest(name) AS 'Peça', latest(sku) AS 'SKU', latest(currentStock) AS 'Estoque atual', latest(minimumStock) AS 'Mínimo' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='StockLowAlert' FACET partId SINCE 1 week ago LIMIT 50
SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE eventName='StockInsufficient') AS 'Insufficient (24h)', filter(count(*), WHERE eventName='StockLowAlert') AS 'LowStock (24h)' FROM AutoflowBizEvent SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Charges criadas', sum(totalCents)/100 AS 'R$ total solicitado' FROM AutoflowBizEvent WHERE eventName='ChargeCreated' SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Volume de eventos custom por tipo

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM AutoflowBizEvent FACET eventName SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 30

pages.name: APM
pages.description: Throughput, latência, erros e Apdex dos microsserviços autoflow-*.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS rpm FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'autoflow-%' FACET appName TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentile(duration*1000, 95) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'autoflow-%' FACET appName TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM TransactionError WHERE appName LIKE 'autoflow-%' FACET appName TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT apdex(duration, t: 0.5) AS Apdex, average(duration*1000) AS 'Avg ms', count(*) AS Reqs FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'autoflow-%' FACET appName SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration*1000) AS 'Avg ms', percentile(duration*1000, 95) AS 'p95 ms', count(*) AS Reqs FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'autoflow-%' FACET appName, name LIMIT 10 SINCE 1 hour ago
